props.children: Launch pages faster with a visual builder that stays structured.
This sample page shows nested sections, editable props, theme tokens, data records, actions, responsive grids and export-ready Builder JSON in one polished canvas.

props.alt: Team working on a launch dashboard

props.children: Select any layer, inspect its props, change theme tokens or switch to JSON to see the canonical page contract.

props.title: Built to show the Builder workflow at a glance

features.title: Visual composition

features.title: Portable schema
features.description: The same document powers preview, JSON editing, AI patches and static export.

props.children: Built to show the Builder workflow at a glance
The page combines visual blocks with real schema-backed components so every part can be selected, edited, validated and exported.
Nested sections, cards, grids and typography make the layer tree useful immediately.
Headlines, badges, actions, images and pricing content are all editable in the property panel.
The same document powers preview, JSON editing, AI patches and static export.
From idea to export without leaving Builder
Use this page to test the everyday loop: pick a layer, change props, preview responsive sizes, inspect JSON, then export.
Open Layers or Components and select sections, cards, buttons or text directly from the page tree.
Change colors, copy, spacing and data in the right panels while the live preview stays in sync.
The canonical JSON can be saved, validated, patched by AI and exported as static HTML.

props.title: A realistic pricing block, ready to edit
props.description: Pricing plans are plain Builder props, so the property panel can update names, prices, feature lists and CTA labels.

props.children: A realistic pricing block, ready to edit
